headline: Why Now May Be the Right Time to Pay Attention to S&P Global Stock
summary: Most investors still see S&P Global as a traditional ratings company. But beneath the surface, the business may be evolving into one of the most important financial infrastructure platforms of the AI era.

headline: 3 Reasons R is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since May 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 81.6%. But one standout stock has more than doubled the market - over the past five years, Ryder has surged 172% to $230.65 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 38.9% in the last six months thanks to its solid quarterly results, beating the S&P by 25.6%.
